project_type: TypeScript monorepo - pnpm workspaces with apps/, packages/, services/
build_system: pnpm@10.28.1 with turbo, no turbo build needed for tests. Individual packages use tsc.
test_framework: Vitest ^2 with vi.mock, vi.fn patterns. Tests are co-located with source (*.test.ts). Root vitest.config.ts defines globals: true.
verification_instructions: Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run from project root. Expect all tests to pass except packages/shared-ui (DOM environment issue pre-existing).
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - can install npm packages. No Docker daemon available for docker-compose. Qdrant and MeiliSearch are mocked in tests.
contribution_requirements: Conventional commits, TypeScript strict (no any), Zod for all schemas, every new file gets .test.ts
key_patterns: - Packages export from src/index.ts barrel file. - Services have src/main.ts entry point with Kafka/pino patterns. - @quant/ai provides AIEngine, RoutingTable with task types like embedding_bulk and reranking. - @quant/search already has SearchClient (MeiliSearch), BM25Ranker, FacetedSearch, and types.ts with full search type defs. - @quant/queue uses BullMQ. - @quant/common provides shared types. - Tests mock external clients (MeiliSearch, Kafka) with vi.mock. - docker-compose.dev.yml exists with postgres, redis, minio, meilisearch, nats, redpanda.
directory_structure: packages/search/src/ - search library with core/ (bm25, facets, autocomplete, analytics, inverted-index) and services/ (search-client MeiliSearch wrapper). services/ - backend microservices (cdc-relay, mail-api, chat-api, etc). packages/ai/ - AI engine with routing table supporting embedding_bulk and reranking task types.
